overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The character moves from a street food cart through covered walkways, across intersections, past an NCPD station, and into dense commercial areas with heavy pedestrian traffic and futuristic vehicles.

events.description: character turns away from food cart and walks into covered walkway

agents.ego_description: examining colorful food bowls at a street cart before turning and walking away

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing white hat sitting beside the food cart
pedestrian in white shirt and black tie walking past the cart

entered.detail: metal street cart displaying colorful food bowls in circular containers
seated vendor wearing white wide-brimmed hat and teal jacket
futuristic red sports car with headlights on driving past
glowing pink and blue neon signs on distant building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a Night City street corner where the character examines a food cart displaying colorful bowls. A vendor in a white hat sits nearby while pedestrians pass. The character then turns and walks into a covered walkway with large concrete pillars as a red sports car drives past in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway leading to major intersection

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with tall futuristic buildings visible
character steps onto wide yellow crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway and approaching a large urban intersection

muscular pedestrian in gray tank top walking alongside

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered walkway with massive concrete pillars, transitioning to an open intersection. The scene reveals a wide yellow crosswalk and futuristic overpass structures overhead as the character prepares to cross the street with other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-side food stall with outdoor seating and NCPD station approach

events.description: character slows to observe the pizza vendor and food display
character continues walking past the food stall toward the NCPD building

agents.ego_description: pausing to look at a street food vendor selling pizza before continuing down the sidewalk

security guard in white shirt and black tie monitoring the street

vendor in white jacket standing behind the food display
blue illuminated NCPD police department signage

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character approaches an open-air pizza stall with green stools, slowing to observe the vendor. The NCPD police station sign becomes visible in the distance as the character moves along the busy sidewalk with opposing pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with NCPD station and heavy pedestrian traffic

events.description: entering area with dense pedestrian traffic near NCPD station entrance
waiting for futuristic vehicles to pass before crossing the street

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense crowds of pedestrians and crossing streets near the police station

notable_agents.action: group of children running along the sidewalk near the crosswalk
futuristic red and white sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: futuristic police station facade with blue neon NCPD signage
colorful retro-style arcade cabinet with anime graphics on sidewalk
sleek futuristic cars with glowing accents driving on multi-lane street

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a densely populated area near the NCPD police station, passing an arcade machine on the sidewalk. The crowd thickens with various pedestrians including children running. The character waits for futuristic vehicles to pass before crossing another wide street with yellow markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with massive neon billboards and advertisements

events.description: entering main commercial strip with towering neon advertisements and billboards

agents.ego_description: walking down a brightly lit commercial street surrounded by towering neon signs and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking while holding a drink
pedestrian with bright pink hair and cybernetic implants walking

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard sign reading MARK 24 in bold letters
towering building facades covered in colorful digital advertisements and neon lights
tall futuristic glass and steel towers reaching into the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vibrant commercial district dominated by the glowing MARK 24 sign and massive neon billboards covering the buildings. The street is filled with pedestrians including a person with bright pink cybernetic hair. Towering glass skyscrapers rise in the background as the character continues down the neon-lit sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet street corner through increasingly crowded urban intersections into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins at a food cart where the character examines colorful bowls before turning into a covered walkway supported by massive concrete pillars as a red sports car speeds past. As the character emerges from the walkway, the scene opens into a wide intersection with yellow crosswalks and futuristic overpasses, eventually shifting toward a busy sidewalk featuring an open-air pizza stall and a distant NCPD police station sign. The camera then pushes through a thickening crowd of pedestrians and past a sidewalk arcade machine, pausing for futuristic vehicles before crossing another wide street. Finally, the environment expands into a dense commercial hub dominated by towering glass skyscrapers and massive glowing billboards, including a prominent MARK 24 sign, as the character blends into the neon-lit throng of city dwellers.
